full_text:
Cheng Kuang 程曠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Kuang (程曠). One of the Ten Regular Attendants. Killed by Yuan Shao and Cao Cao. Cheng Kuang may not have existed in history. Cheng Kuang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Cheng Kuang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
